name: tiny-engine
desc: TinyEngine is a low-code engine based on which you can build or develop low-code platforms in different domains/TinyEngine是一个低代码引擎，基于这个引擎可以构建或者开发出不同领域的低代码平台
descFull: TinyEngine is a low-code engine based on which you can build or develop low-code platforms in different domains/TinyEngine是一个低代码引擎，基于这个引擎可以构建或者开发出不同领域的低代码平台
